name: Bug report
about: Report an error or unexpected behavior during script execution

assignees: ''
---

**Which update section failed?**
<!-- e.g., Winget, WindowsUpdate, npm, Scoop, cleanup, etc. -->

**Error message**
```
Paste the error output here
```

- OS version: <!-- Run: [System.Environment]::OSVersion.Version -->
- Script version: <!-- 2.2.0 -->

**Command used**
```powershell
.\updatescript.ps1 <your flags here>
```

**Log file (if available)**

**Additional context**
